scripts.build:client: npm run build:icons && esbuild frontend/src/theme/bootstrap.ts --bundle --outfile=public/js/theme-init.js --format=iife --platform=browser && esbuild frontend/src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=public/js/app.js --format=esm --platform=browser && cp frontend/public/favicon.svg frontend/public/index.html frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest frontend/public/sw.js public/
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: npm run build:css && npm run build:client && concurrently -n server,app,theme,css -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "tsx watch --env-file=.env backend/src/index.ts" "esbuild frontend/src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=public/js/app.js --format=esm --platform=browser --watch" "esbuild frontend/src/theme/bootstrap.ts --bundle --outfile=public/js/theme-init.js --format=iife --platform=browser --watch" "tailwindcss -i frontend/src/styles/main.css -o public/css/main.css --watch"
